category_sources: source_facts.description says qdmr is a codeplug programming tool for DMR radios; official manual describes programming DMR radios.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is qdmr; official homepage, manual, and GitHub repository use qdmr/QDMR naming.
docs_sources: Official qdmr website hosts the user manual and project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/hmatuschek/qdmr, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies DMR radio codeplug programming; official manual describes qdmr as a GUI application to program DMR radios.
